name: Horseshoe Mountain Ranch Pinto Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the beans and place them in a large pot or kettle.
2. Add water and remaining ingredients (except salt) to the pot.
3. Cover and simmer for 5 to 6 hours, checking the liquid level occasionally and adding more boiling water as needed to keep the beans covered.
4. Add the salt 30 minutes before the beans are done.
5. These pinto beans are excellent on their own, but you can add more garlic or chili powder for extra flavor. They also work well in a crockpot: Use 1 quart of water and cook on the low setting for about 6 to 7 hours.
